fast-forwarding the primary checkout's main to include the just-merged PR #93 squash commit from origin. This is intentional post-merge sync (no local edits, clean FF), not routine implementation work — the whole point is to keep the root checkout canonical so the next session doesn't branch off stale main.

extras.command:
# root-checkout-waiver: fast-forwarding the primary checkout's main to include the just-merged PR #93 squash commit from origin. This is intentional post-merge sync (no local edits, clean FF), not routine implementation work — the whole point is to keep the root checkout canonical so the next session doesn't branch off stale main.
cd /Users/alexandervyhmeister/GitHub/escapement
git pull --ff-only origin main 2>&1 | tail -6
echo "=== main now ==="; git log --oneline -1
echo "=== fix present on main? ==="; grep -c "activate_project" claude/hooks/serena_onboarding_check.sh >/dev/null && echo "YES — activation branch on main"

reason: git -C targets the pinned deploy clone (~/.claude/.escapement-pinned-45bfe06), not the root; discarding a redundant uncommitted copy of already-merged #93 to unblock deploy

extras.command:
# root-checkout-waiver: git -C targets the pinned deploy clone (~/.claude/.escapement-pinned-45bfe06), not the root; discarding a redundant uncommitted copy of already-merged #93 to unblock deploy
PIN=/Users/alexandervyhmeister/.claude/.escapement-pinned-45bfe06
git -C "$PIN" checkout -- claude/hooks/serena_onboarding_check.sh
echo "pin dirty files now: $(git -C "$PIN" status --porcelain | wc -l | tr -d ' ')"
bash INSTALL.sh --update 2>&1 | tail -12

reason: removing two BROKEN deploy symlinks under ~/.claude/hooks (not root files); they point at ceiling files deleted from the pin

extras.command:
# root-checkout-waiver: removing two BROKEN deploy symlinks under ~/.claude/hooks (not root files); they point at ceiling files deleted from the pin
rm -f ~/.claude/hooks/ceiling_push_cap.py ~/.claude/hooks/_repo_policy.py
ls ~/.claude/hooks/ceiling_push_cap.py ~/.claude/hooks/_repo_policy.py 2>&1 | sed 's/.*No such.*/GONE/' | sort -u

reason: fetch + ff-only sync of shared root main to the CURRENT origin/main (ceiling-removal PR #95) so the settings template stops re-adding the removed ceiling on --update; non-destructive ff

extras.command:
# root-checkout-waiver: fetch + ff-only sync of shared root main to the CURRENT origin/main (ceiling-removal PR #95) so the settings template stops re-adding the removed ceiling on --update; non-destructive ff
cd /Users/alexandervyhmeister/GitHub/escapement
git fetch --quiet origin main
git merge --ff-only origin/main 2>&1 | tail -2
echo "root behind by: $(git rev-list --count HEAD..origin/main) ; template ceiling refs: $(grep -c ceiling_push_cap claude/settings.template.json) ; HEAD: $(git log --oneline -1)"
